ddls:
CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text editor */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor of the text editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the text editor */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the text editor */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the text editor */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating systems supported by the text editor */,
  "support" TEXT /* Support channels available for the text editor */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Type of documentation available for the text editor */,
  "extensible" INTEGER /* Whether the text editor is extensible or not */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the text editor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the text editor */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the text editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_price FOREIGN KEY ("price") REFERENCES prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_support FOREIGN KEY ("support") REFERENCES supports ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_os FOREIGN KEY ("os") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_documentation FOREIGN KEY ("documentation") REFERENCES documentations ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supports" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support channel */,
  "support_name" TEXT /* Name of the support channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentations" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of documentation */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of documentation */,
  "doc_format" TEXT /* Format of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "price_name" TEXT /* Name of the price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "activation_status" INTEGER /* Activation status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text editor being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpfulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpfulness votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text editor the extension belongs to */,
  "extension_name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extension */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the extension */,
  "extension_type" TEXT /* Type of the extension */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the extension */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility of the extension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extensions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplace" (
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace transaction */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension being purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price of the purchase */,
  "purchase_type" TEXT /* Type of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text editor being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., downloads, active users) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the thread belongs to */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "thread_description" TEXT /* Description of the thread */,
  "thread_date" TEXT /* Date the thread was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)
